3201660.name: Zurarararush!!! Demo
3201660.description:
🧢 Destroy the Virus with Your Wig!!!

🧠 ~ About the Demo ~

Zurarararush!!! is a fast, funny, and satisfying twin-stick shooter where you defeat viruses using your ultimate weapon — a wig (ZURA)!

In this demo, you can play the 4-minute Score Attack Mode.
Compete with players around the world and see how long you can keep your combo going before time runs out!
Every second counts — precision, timing, and wig management are key to high scores.

🎮 ~ How to Play ~

  • Defeat enemies in quick succession to keep your combo alive!

  • Collect more ZURAs to maintain your combo streak!

  • Stack ZURAs for massive firepower boosts!

  • But beware — each ZURA has limited ammo (hair volume)!
    Perfect timing and quick judgment will decide your fate!

⚡ ~ The Rush You’ll Feel ~

Endless enemies and projectiles will overload your brain,
creating an intense cycle of dodging and attacking that feels both frantic and fun.

Then, the moment you wipe out a wave —
stress melts away, euphoria kicks in, and you enter the ultimate flow state.

It’s that short-burst arcade thrill, reborn for the modern era.

🦠 ~ Story ~

20XX — A mutated virus causes a global pandemic.
Humanity is consumed by fear and despair...

Until one day, a new weapon is developed —
the ZURA, capable of directly attacking viruses!

You are a microscopic doctor in a Micro Suit,
and humanity’s last hope rests on your head — literally!
Put on your ZURA and dive into the fight to save the world!

🧬 ~ About the Full Game ~

The full version will feature two main modes:

🧩 Arcade Mode
Includes 10+ stages and a lighthearted story about bonds — lovers, family, and friendship.
Collect DNA and upgrade your powers RPG-style to reach the ending.
Anyone can finish it with persistence and skill!

💥 Score Attack Mode
Choose between 4-Minute and Endless variations.
Compete for the highest score on global leaderboards!
Keep your combos going by collecting ZURAs and unleash insane damage.

⏰ Estimated Playtime
Demo: About 4 minutes per run — play as many times as you want!
Full Game: Around 20–30 hours of total content planned.

💬 ~ From the Developer ~

We created this game to bring back that pure, arcade-style rush —
the kind of fun that makes you feel good, even in just a few minutes.

“Put it on, dodge everything, and shoot like crazy!
Blow those viruses away with your ZURA!”
